title: quercus stenophylla
intro: Quercus stenophylla, also known as the Japanese evergreen oak or narrowleaf evergreen oak, is a species of deciduous tree native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Quercus stenophylla include its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain types of cancer. Quercus stenophylla is often used in traditional herbal preparations, such as tea, tinctures, and capsules, to support overall health and well-being.
